seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
response:
Subject: Join Our Exciting New Book Club Adventure!

Dear Friends, I am thrilled to invite you to start a wonderful new book club together, where we can share stories, deepen our connections, and explore diverse literary worlds. This group is designed specifically for us to relax, discuss our favorite reads, and enjoy meaningful conversations in a warm and welcoming atmosphere that feels just right for our friendship.

We will meet once a month at my cozy home, starting next Friday evening, where we will enjoy delicious snacks, great company, and lively debates about the latest chapters we have all finished reading together. Our first selection will be a captivating mystery novel that promises to keep us guessing until the very end, ensuring that our initial gathering is filled with suspense, laughter, and plenty of interesting perspectives from everyone attending.

Please let me know by this coming Sunday if you can join us so we can finalize the guest list and prepare enough treats for all of you. I truly believe this club will become a cherished tradition that brings us even closer while expanding our horizons through the power of storytelling and shared experiences.
